# The Standard Playbook

> High-performance coaching for elite entrepreneurs specializing in insurance agency growth, producer development, and sales training. Based in Fort Wayne, Indiana. Founded by Justin — Founder & Head Coach.

The Standard Playbook (standardplaybook.com) helps insurance agency owners and producers build systematic, high-performing businesses through coaching, masterminds, and technology-powered training platforms. The company operates as Standard Playbook INC (DBA Agency Brain).

## Coaching Programs

- [The Boardroom](https://standardplaybook.com/boardroom): Elite mastermind for insurance agency owners — $299/month for peer accountability, strategy sessions, and growth frameworks from $1M+ agency operators.
- [The Directive](https://standardplaybook.com/directive): Intensive 1:1 implementation coaching with direct access to Justin. Includes monthly private coaching calls, weekly check-ins, accountability protocols, and 100 AI-graded calls per month.
- [Partnership](https://standardplaybook.com/partnership): White-glove business partnership for elite entrepreneurs generating $1M+ annually. Includes direct phone access, revenue-sharing, joint venture opportunities, and dedicated account management. Limited to 12 clients.
- [Sales Experience](https://standardplaybook.com/sales-experience): 8-week sales management training program with dashboard analytics, training modules with feedback, sales process frameworks, accountability metrics, and consequence ladder systems.
- [Producer Power-Up](https://standardplaybook.com/producer-power-up): 6-week sales transformation challenge for insurance producers. Rolling enrollment with daily 3-5 minute video modules, Core 4 habit tracking, weekly Discovery Stacks, and 60-day app access. $299/producer.
- [Owner Challenge](https://standardplaybook.com/owner-challenge): 6-week Core 4 & Leadership Challenge for agency owners. Identity-driven micro-lessons, leadership habit system, executive templates, and weekly reinforcement emails.

## Technology Platform

- [Standard Call Scoring](https://standardplaybook.com/callscoring): AI-powered call evaluation tool providing instant insights, consistent feedback, and performance acceleration for sales teams.
- [The Standard Playbook App](https://standardplaybook.com/app): Sales training and accountability platform featuring The Armory (30 training modules), Core 4 Tracker (habit gamification), and 19 Stacking frameworks.

## About

- [About Us](https://standardplaybook.com/about): Learn about our mission, team, and coaching philosophy. 500+ entrepreneurs coached, $500M+ revenue generated by community members.
